query:
UPDATE music_video_jobs SET status = 'failed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = 540002;
UPDATE music_video_scenes SET status = 'failed', updated_at = NOW() WHERE job_id = 540002 AND status IN ('pending', 'generating');
